author: EZRA-DVLPR
description: Displays a wheel that when clicked, selects a random item from the wheel. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: EZRA-DVLPR
manifest.description: Displays a wheel that when clicked, selects a random item from the wheel.
manifest.name: Wheel Picker

name: Wheel Picker

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
This update adds an indicator in the status bar showing how many wheels are in the current note.
There is a new setting disabling this feature (though it is enabled by default).

I'm still new to github actions and versioning stuff, so please forgive the amount of commits and mismatch between tags, version number, and so forth.
releases.name: 1.1.2 - Status Bar Update!
